content structure,data organization	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Musician Profile
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv consists of musician profiles, each containing detailed attributes about musicians.

data linkage,unique identifier	Performer_Registry.csv
Wikidata Identifier
Performer_Registry.csv uses Wikidata Identifiers to uniquely identify musicians.

data attribute,personal information	Birth Date
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv provides the birth dates for musicians.

data linkage,unique identifier	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Wikidata Identifier
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv uses Wikidata Identifiers to uniquely identify musicians.

data attribute,personal information	Family Name
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv records family names for each musician.

data attribute,personal information	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Birth Date
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv contains musicians’ birth dates as a core data attribute.

content structure,data organization	Musician Profile
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv contains musician profiles with family and career information.

data attribute,personal information	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Family Name
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv stores musicians’ family names.

data attribute,personal information	Given Name
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv records forenames (given names) for each musician.

biographical data,family details	Number Of Children
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv records the number of children for each musician as NChildren.

data attribute,personal information	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Given Name
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv includes given names (first names) for each musician.

biographical data,family details	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Number Of Children
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv reports the number of children each musician has.

external link,personal webpage	Performer_Registry.csv
Webpage
Performer_Registry.csv lists the musician’s personal official webpages.

external link,personal webpage	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Official Website
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv contains the official website URLs for musicians.

biography,location	Birth City
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv records the birth city for each musician.

biography,location	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Residence
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv identifies the residence city for each musician.

personal identification,profile data	Musician Name
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv records musician names, which may include IPI numbers.

demographics,personal information	Gender
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv provides information on the gender of each musician.

cultural group,personal background	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Ethnicity
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv specifies each musician's ethnicity.

personal background,spiritual belief	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Religion
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv includes data on the religion of each musician.

biographical data,family	Father Name
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv lists the names of musicians’ fathers.

career,chronology	Activity Start
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv indicates the year that each musician began their professional activity.

artist affiliation,music industry	Musician
Record Label
Musicians are affiliated with record labels, as documented in the Artist_Encyclopedia.csv.

biographical data,family	Mother Name
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv lists the names of musicians’ mothers.

biographical data,personal beliefs	Musician
Religion
A musician's religion is included as part of their profile information in Artist_Encyclopedia.csv.

profile data,social media	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Twitter Username
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv lists the Twitter usernames for musicians.

biographical data,family	Performer_Registry.csv
Spouse Name
Performer_Registry.csv records the names of musicians’ spouses.

music platform,profile data	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Genius Artist Name
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv records the formatted Genius artist names for each musician.

genre,performance style	Musical Kind
Performer_Registry.csv
Performer_Registry.csv includes the musical kind or genre associated with the musician.

biographical data,cultural background	Ethnicity
Musician
Ethnicity information is associated with each musician in the Artist_Encyclopedia.csv.

affiliation,music industry	Artist_Encyclopedia.csv
Record Label
Artist_Encyclopedia.csv provides the name of the record label associated with each musician.

digital presence,social media	Musician
Twitter Username
Each musician has an associated Twitter username recorded in Artist_Encyclopedia.csv.

digital presence,personal website	Musician
Official Website
A musician's official website is recorded as part of their profile in both data tables.

biographical information,location	City
Musician
City is recorded as the place of birth or residence for musicians in both data tables.

family,personal relationship	Musician
Spouse Name
The name of a musician’s spouse is included in their profile in the Performer_Registry.csv.

family relationship,parent	Father Name
Musician
The Performer_Registry.csv records the name of a musician’s father in their profile.

family relationship,parent	Mother Name
Musician
The Performer_Registry.csv records the name of a musician’s mother in their profile.

artistic style,music genre	Musical Kind
Musician
Musical kind or genre is associated with each musician in the Performer_Registry.csv.

career,chronology	Activity Start
Musician
Activity start indicates when each musician began their professional activity as documented in Artist_Encyclopedia.csv.

identifier,professional registration	IPI Number
Musician Name
Some musician names in Performer_Registry.csv include an IPI identification number as part of their entry.

family,offspring	Musician
Number Of Children
The number of children for each musician is recorded in both tables.

identification,music platform	Genius Artist Name
Musician
Each musician has a corresponding Genius artist name in Artist_Encyclopedia.csv.

date of birth,personal information	Birth Date
Musician
Musicians' birth dates are specified in both data tables as a key part of their profile.

personal information,surname	Family Name
Musician
Each musician has a listed family name in both data tables.

first name,personal information	Given Name
Musician
Each musician has a listed given name or forename in both data tables.

identification,unique linkage	Musician
Wikidata Identifier
Each musician is uniquely identified by a Wikidata identifier in both data tables.
